title: Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center
text: Siemens 3T Cima.X arrives at Notre Dame!

title: Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center
text:
Welcome!
Welcome to the Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center (ND-HNC) Resources for Operations and Computing – your guide for conducting cutting-edge research.
Whether you are a seasoned principal investigator, a graduate student launching your first study, or a visiting researcher, this platform is designed to streamline your workflow and support your scientific discovery. Here, you will find everything you need to navigate our facility and maximize your research impact:

Facilities & Scheduling: Explore our state-of-the-art neuroimaging instrumentation and learn how to reserve magnet time and specialized testing rooms.
Compute Resources: Access technical specifications and documentation for our high-performance computing pipelines, tailored for heavy neuroimaging data loads.
Policies & SOPs: Review our official standard operating procedures, safety protocols, and center policies to ensure compliant, efficient, and safe data collection.
The NDHNC Wiki: Dive into a community-driven knowledge base featuring tutorials, code snippets, and troubleshooting guides for programming, general data analysis, and advanced MRI processing (including fMRI, structural, and diffusion pipelines).

Our mission is to empower the Notre Dame community and our partners with the infrastructure, technical expertise, and collaborative environment necessary to push the boundaries of human neuroscience.

About
Welcome to the Notre Dame Human Neuroimaging Center (ND-HNC) – Resources for Operations and Computing page!
Our aim is to provide resources and support for every step of your research program, from grant application to publication, and the many technical details in between:

Training: Get access by scheduling and maintaining your training
